## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between GrowthX and AppSignal for AI-driven content strategy and creation.](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AppSignal targets the SMB/mid-market APM space, offering 80% of Datadog's functionality at 30% of the price](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [GrowthX's AI-driven content approach has shown impressive results, particularly with Augment Code (100+ pieces in 3 months, multiple AI citations)](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [AppSignal currently spends \~$5k/month on content with limited strategy and conversion; seeking to optimize and scale content efforts](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a comprehensive solution combining AI tools, human oversight, and strategic guidance](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)

## Topics

### AppSignal's Current Situation and Goals

  - [10-year-old startup recently acquired by growth investment PE firm](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Targeting the lower end of the observability/APM market (SMBs, startups, new AI companies)](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Current content strategy: $4-5k/month spent on freelance authors, language-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Challenge: Content is popular but doesn't convert well to product awareness/sales](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Goal: Improve content strategy, increase conversion, and scale content production efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Driven Content Approach

  - [Built on Marcel's extensive experience in helping brands become publishers](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Uses a custom-built platform with advanced AI capabilities:](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
      - [Deep research using Exa AI for high-quality information gathering](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [Knowledge graph storage for better semantic understanding](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Agentic workflows for content creation and improvement](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [Human editors in the loop for quality control and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [Focuses on creating a high volume of quality content with strategic intent](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Aims to optimize for both search visibility and AI citations](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Case Study: Augment Code

  - [100+ pieces of content produced in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Achieved top organic search results for key terms](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Multiple citations in AI-generated answers (up to 6 in one example)](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Demonstrates the potential for rapid content scaling and SEO impact](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)

### Build vs. Buy Considerations

  - [DIY approach challenges: need for strategy, human oversight, and last-mile execution](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Costs of piecing together solutions (e.g., hiring freelancers, purchasing tools like AirOps, hiring GTM engineers)](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
  - [GrowthX offers an all-in-one solution combining technology, strategy, and execution](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)

### Content Strategy Philosophy

  - [Balance between thought leadership and search optimization](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Portfolio approach: create a high volume of quality content, learn from signals, and optimize](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Importance of being cited in AI-generated answers and search results](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mike to review the Statement of Work (SoW) sent by Tyler](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide customer references, potentially including James from Engine.com](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Mike to consider looping in other AppSignal stakeholders for further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting to be scheduled if needed](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [AppSignal to evaluate GrowthX's offering against their current content strategy and needs](https://fathom.video/share/WjP2w47xtAxWhFSPW6-GwJa6iwT4sAs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
